rationale.R1.2: A review of this section centrally requires checking whether the argumentative chain from ablation results to conclusions is internally consistent.
rationale.R1.3: Because the section makes explicit claims from reported benchmark numbers, verifying whether the claims match the table values is load-bearing.
rationale.R1.6: A general section review is expected to cover sentence-level clarity, flow, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: The reviewer must disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks enough information to verify unstated assumptions or missing experimental details.
rationale.RX.2: The reviewer must flag conclusions that exceed what the reported ablation evidence can support.
rationale.RX.3: The reviewer must stay within reviewing the provided section rather than rewriting it or conducting external evaluation.
rationale.RX.4: The reviewer must avoid endorsing misleading empirical claims that could distort downstream research decisions.
rationale.RX.5: The reviewer must ground observations in the provided text and reported numbers so issues are traceable.
